Team & providers
Manage access and roles
My Words — custom vocabulary
Teach LANE your terminology. Words you add here are recognized instantly during voice recording, across every accent.
Built-in medical dictionary active
778 clinical terms pre-loaded across 15 categories: spinal levels (L1-S1), orthopedic tests (HVLA, FABER, Kemp's, Spurling's, SLR), anatomy (200+ terms), conditions, treatments, measurements, and clinical language. All auto-corrected from common speech patterns across any accent.
LANE.

Set hours per day
Toggle the switch to mark a day as closed. Changes are saved automatically.

All automations start immediately
24h reminders, 2h same-day reminders, post-visit check-ins, and waitlist auto-fill are all ON from day one. Adjust anytime in the Reminders screen.

Import patients
Bring your existing patient list into LANE
Option 1 — Upload a CSV file
Click to upload or drag & drop
CSV file · Any column order · Headers auto-detected
Supported columns (any order, auto-detected): name, first name, last name, insurance, phone, email, date of birth, plan.
Missing columns are left blank and can be filled in per patient later.
OR
Option 2 — Paste a name list
OR
Option 3 — Import from your current system
